name: Shrimp Omeletes
recipeIngredient: 2 tsp (10 mL) instant chicken bouillon granules
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small saucepan, combine water, cornstarch, sugar, soy sauce, and chicken bouillon granules. Cook over medium heat until the mixture boils and thickens, about 5 minutes.
2. In a medium bowl, beat together eggs, salt, and pepper until frothy.
3. Finely chop mushrooms. Heat 1 tablespoon (15 mL) of oil in a small skillet. Cook mushrooms for 1 minute. Stir mushrooms into egg mixture.
4. Wash and drain bean sprouts. Remove shells and veins from shrimp. Finely chop shrimp, green onions, and celery. Mix the sprouts, shrimp, chopped onions, and celery into the egg mixture.
5. For each omelet, heat 1/2 tablespoon (7 mL) of oil in a large skillet or 7-inch (18 cm) omelet pan over medium heat until hot. Pour about 1/2 cup (125 mL) egg mixture into the oil. Cook until light brown, 2 to 3 minutes on each side.
6. Stack omelets on serving plates. Pour warm soy sauce mixture over the omelets and garnish with sliced green onions. Makes 4 servings (2 omelets each).
